results.descriptionEn: RAID0 means that the entire logical disk data is striped among multiple physical disks, it allows read/write in parallel and provides the fastest speed with no redundancy.
results.descriptionZh: RAID0是整个逻辑盘的数据是被分条（stripped）分布在多个物理磁盘上，可以并行读/写，提供最快的速度，但没有冗余能力。

results.descriptionEn: RAID1 also known as mirroring method, provides data redundancy. In the entire mirroring process, only half of the disk capacity is valid, the other half is used to store the same data. RAID1 has taken security into consideration with half capacity and full speed.
results.descriptionZh: RAID1又称镜像方式，提供数据的冗余。在整个镜像过程中，只有一半的磁盘容量是有效的（另一半磁盘容量用来存放同样的数据），RAID1考虑了安全性，容量减半、速度不变。
